account_tokens_email_version_check.name: account_tokens_email_version_check
account_tokens_email_version_check.value:
("account_tokens"."purpose" in ('email_verification', 'email_change') and "account_tokens"."email_version" is not null and "account_tokens"."email_version" >= 0)
        or ("account_tokens"."purpose" = 'password_reset' and "account_tokens"."email_version" is null)

account_tokens_lifecycle_check.name: account_tokens_lifecycle_check
account_tokens_lifecycle_check.value:
not ("account_tokens"."consumed_at" is not null and "account_tokens"."invalidated_at" is not null)
        and ("account_tokens"."invalidated_at" is null) = ("account_tokens"."invalidation_reason" is null)
        and ("account_tokens"."consumed_at" is null or "account_tokens"."consumed_at" >= "account_tokens"."created_at")
        and ("account_tokens"."invalidated_at" is null or "account_tokens"."invalidated_at" >= "account_tokens"."created_at")

order_items_monetary_shape_check.name: order_items_monetary_shape_check
order_items_monetary_shape_check.value:
("order_items"."pricing_state" = 'legacy_unpriced'
        and "order_items"."unit_price_minor" is null
        and "order_items"."line_subtotal_minor" is null)
        or ("order_items"."pricing_state" = 'priced'
          and "order_items"."unit_price_minor" between 0 and 9000000000000000
          and "order_items"."line_subtotal_minor" between 0 and 9000000000000000
          and "order_items"."line_subtotal_minor" = "order_items"."unit_price_minor" * "order_items"."quantity")

orders_monetary_shape_check.name: orders_monetary_shape_check
orders_monetary_shape_check.value:
("orders"."pricing_state" = 'legacy_unpriced'
        and "orders"."currency_code" is null
        and "orders"."currency_minor_unit" is null
        and "orders"."subtotal_minor" is null
        and "orders"."discount_minor" is null
        and "orders"."shipping_minor" is null
        and "orders"."total_minor" is null)
        or ("orders"."pricing_state" = 'priced'
          and "orders"."currency_code" is not null
          and "orders"."currency_minor_unit" is not null
          and "orders"."subtotal_minor" is not null
          and "orders"."discount_minor" is not null
          and "orders"."shipping_minor" is not null
          and "orders"."total_minor" is not null)

orders_monetary_amounts_check.name: orders_monetary_amounts_check
orders_monetary_amounts_check.value:
"orders"."pricing_state" = 'legacy_unpriced' or (
        "orders"."subtotal_minor" between 0 and 9000000000000000
        and "orders"."discount_minor" between 0 and "orders"."subtotal_minor"
        and "orders"."shipping_minor" between 0 and 9000000000000000
        and "orders"."total_minor" between 0 and 9000000000000000
        and "orders"."total_minor" = "orders"."subtotal_minor" - "orders"."discount_minor" + "orders"."shipping_minor"
      )
